name: Acceptance of a resource flow
description: A domain-agnostic flow of a resource between two anchors — a material delivery, an equipment rental, a crew ride, a stock issue (consume), or a payment. Each flow is one Acceptance Act; a domain pack (logistics, finance) specializes the reference it cross-checks against. See docs/architecture/resource-flow-and-domains.md.

evidence.description: An independent count of the moved quantity — a weighbridge ticket, telematics hours, a signed crew manifest.

checks.description: The moved quantity must be stated.
Claimed quantity should be within 3% of the independent reference count — advisory.

reviewer.description: The receiving party that confirms the flow.
